emiratesid.ae.sm.modules
Class SecureMessagingModulesFactory

java.lang.Object
  emiratesid.ae.sm.modules.SecureMessagingModulesFactory

public class SecureMessagingModulesFactory
extends java.lang.Object

Copyright (c) 2010 LOGICA. All Rights Reserved. Secure Messaging Module factory class, A factory class to create Secure Messaging Module objects

Since:
1.6
Version:
2.0
Author:
Hakim SEBSSI

Method Summary
 void discoverRemoteSecureMessagingModules(boolean refresh, int type, java.lang.String password, java.lang.String address)
          Discover and initialized all available remote secure messaging modules

          Discover and initialized all available local secure messaging modules

Method Detail

getInstance

public static SecureMessagingModulesFactory getInstance()
Returns factory instance or create one if it's not intialized

Returns:

list

public java.util.ArrayList list()
List all secure messaging modules discovered

Returns:

discoverRemoteSecureMessagingModules

public void discoverRemoteSecureMessagingModules(boolean refresh,
                                                 int type,
                                                 java.lang.String password,
                                                 java.lang.String address)
                                          throws MiddlewareException
Discover and initialized all available remote secure messaging modules

Parameters:
refresh - re-discover modules if already discovered
type - modules type to discover
password - SM module password or PIN
address - Remote SM server URL
Throws:
MiddlewareException

discoverSecureMessagingModules

public void discoverSecureMessagingModules(boolean refresh,
                                           int type,
                                           char[] password)
                                    throws MiddlewareException
Discover and initialized all available local secure messaging modules

Parameters:
refresh - re-discover modules if already discovered
type - modules type to discover
password - SM module password or PIN
Throws:
MiddlewareException

getModuleById

public SecureMessagingModuleInterface getModuleById(long SM_ID)
Select module form the discovered modules by ID

Parameters:
SM_ID - SM Module ID
Returns:
SM Module if found, or null if not exists

getAvailableModule

public SecureMessagingModuleInterface getAvailableModule(int type)
Retrieves the first available module of the specified type

Parameters:
type - module type
Returns:
